name: Lunch Money MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Lunch Money — a developer-friendly personal budgeting and financial tracking app. Enables AI agents to query transactions, review budget categories, check account balances, analyze spending patterns, and interact with Lunch Money's financial data — supporting AI-driven personal finance management workflows.
use_cases: Querying transactions and spending history from personal finance agents
Analyzing budget categories and spending patterns from financial planning agents
Checking account balances and net worth from financial summary agents
Generating spending insights and budget recommendations from AI financial advisors
not_for: Teams using other budgeting apps (YNAB, Mint, Personal Capital) without Lunch Money
best_when: A Lunch Money user wants AI agents to analyze their spending, summarize finances, and provide insights — accessing their financial data through Lunch Money's well-documented API.
avoid_when: You use YNAB or other budgeting tools. Also: financial data is highly sensitive — implement strict access controls and only use read-only API access for agents.

auth.notes: Lunch Money API token required — generate at lunchmoney.app/developers. Single-token API with full account access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Lunch Money has a paid subscription
pricing.notes: Lunch Money is $10/month. MCP server is free open source community tool. API included with subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Lunch Money API rate limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: Lunch Money API token provides full account access — treat as highly sensitive credential
Financial data (transactions, balances, account info) is extremely sensitive — restrict agent access
Community tool — not official Lunch Money integration; verify API compatibility with current version
Lunch Money has excellent developer API docs — good foundation for reliable integration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Personal financial data — extremely sensitive. API token provides full account access. HTTPS. Never log or cache financial data. Use read-only access patterns.

security_score_components.security_notes: Highly sensitive financial data. Full account access API token. HTTPS. Strict data handling required.
